# Privacy Policy

`layZbay` stores bulk search entries locally in browser storage.

## Data collection

- The extension does not collect or transmit personal data.
- Highlighted text is only used to open eBay search tabs and, if chosen, save entries locally for bulk searches.

## Storage

- Bulk search entries are stored locally in `chrome.storage.local`.
- No remote backend, analytics, or tracking services are used.

## Third parties

- Searches open on eBay in the user’s browser.
- This extension does not send data to any other third party.
